name: Present Simple
explanation:
一般现在时用来描述经常发生的动作、习惯、事实和固定安排。

【结构】
肯定句：I/You/We/They + 动词原形 | He/She/It + 动词三单形式
否定句：don't / doesn't + 动词原形
疑问句：Do/Does + 主语 + 动词原形？

【三单变化规则】
· 一般加 -s：work → works
· 以 s/x/ch/sh/o 结尾加 -es：watch → watches
· 以辅音+y结尾，变 y 为 i 加 -es：study → studies

name: Past Simple
explanation:
一般过去时用来描述过去某个时间发生的动作或存在的状态。

【结构】
肯定句：主语 + 动词过去式
否定句：didn't + 动词原形
疑问句：Did + 主语 + 动词原形？

【规则动词过去式】直接加 -ed：work → worked
【不规则动词】需要记忆：go → went, have → had, see → saw

examples.en: I watched a film last night.
She didn't go to school yesterday.

name: Present Continuous
explanation:
现在进行时用来描述此刻正在进行的动作，或现阶段正在进行的动作。

【结构】am/is/are + 动词-ing

【现在分词 -ing 构成规则】
· 一般加 -ing：go → going
· 以不发音 e 结尾，去 e 加 -ing：make → making
· 以重读闭音节结尾，双写末尾辅音加 -ing：run → running

examples.en: I am reading a book right now.
They are playing football at the moment.

name: be going to (Future)
explanation:
be going to 用来描述将来打算做的事情或即将发生的事。

【结构】
肯定句：主语 + am/is/are going to + 动词原形
否定句：主语 + am/is/are not going to + 动词原形
疑问句：Am/Is/Are + 主语 + going to + 动词原形？

【用法】
· 打算、计划：I am going to visit my grandma.
· 即将发生：Look at the clouds! It is going to rain.

examples.en: I am going to buy a new phone.
She is not going to come.
Are you going to play tennis?

name: Present Perfect
explanation:
现在完成时用来描述过去发生但与现在有联系的动作，或持续到现在的状态。

【结构】have/has + 过去分词

【用法】
· 经历：I have been to Beijing twice.
· 已完成但对现在有影响的动作：I have lost my keys.
· 持续状态：She has lived here for 10 years.

【不规则过去分词】go → gone, see → seen, do → done

name: Modal Verbs: can/could
explanation:
can 和 could 用来表示能力、许可或请求。

【can】现在的能力/许可：I can swim.（我会游泳。）
【could】过去的能力 / 委婉请求：I could swim when I was five.（我五岁时就会游泳了。）Could you help me?（你能帮我吗？语气更委婉）

【结构】can/could + 动词原形（不接 to）

examples.en: Could you open the window, please?
examples.zh: 你能打开窗户吗？（委婉请求）

name: Modal Verbs: must/have to/should
explanation:
must, have to, should 用来表示义务、必要或建议。

【must】主观认为必须：I must finish this today.
【have to】客观需要：I have to wear a uniform.
【should】建议：You should see a doctor.

【结构】must/have to/should + 动词原形

examples.en: I have to get up early.

name: Comparatives & Superlatives
explanation:
比较级用于两者之间的比较，最高级用于三者或以上的比较。

【比较级】A + be/动词 + 比较级 + than + B
· 短形容词 + -er：taller, smaller
· 以 e 结尾 + -r：nicer, larger
· 辅音+y → -ier：heavier, happier
· 长形容词 + more：more interesting, more beautiful

【最高级】the + 最高级 (+ in/of...)
· 短形容词 + -est：the tallest, the smallest
· 长形容词 + most：the most interesting

examples.en: She is taller than her sister.
This is the biggest city in China.
English is more difficult than maths.

name: Superlative
explanation:
最高级用来比较三个或以上的人或事物，表示"最..."。

【结构】
· 短形容词 + -est：the tallest, the biggest
· 长形容词 + most / least：the most beautiful, the most expensive, the least expensive
· 不规则：the best（good）, the worst（bad）, the farthest / furthest（far）

【注意】最高级前通常要加 the

examples.en: He is the tallest in the class.
This is the most delicious cake.

name: Articles: a/an/the
explanation:
冠词用在名词前，帮助说明名词的特指或泛指。

【a/an】泛指"一个"，用于可数名词单数。
a：用在辅音音素开头的单词前：a book, a university（u 发 /j/，辅音）
an：用在元音音素开头的单词前：an apple, an hour（h 不发音）

【the】特指，用于：
· 双方都知道的人或物：Close the door, please.
· 世界上独一无二的事物：the sun, the moon
· 再次提到的人或物：I saw a dog. The dog was brown.

examples.en: I saw a cat and a dog. The dog was very friendly.
examples.zh: 我看见一只猫和一只狗。那只狗很友好。
她是一个诚实的女孩。（h不发音）

examples.en: The Earth goes around the Sun.

name: Pronouns
explanation:
代词用来代替名词，避免重复。

【人称代词】
· 主格（作主语）：I, you, he, she, it, we, they
· 宾格（作宾语）：me, you, him, her, it, us, them

【物主代词】
· 形容词性：my, your, his, her, its, our, their
· 名词性：mine, yours, his, hers, its, ours, theirs

【反身代词】myself, yourself, himself...

name: Prepositions of Time
explanation:
时间介词 in, on, at 的用法。

【in】用于较长的时间
· 年、月、季节：in 2023, in July, in summer
· 一天中的时段：in the morning/afternoon/evening

【on】用于具体的某天
· 星期、日期：on Monday, on May 1st
· 具体某天的早晚：on Monday morning

【at】用于具体的时间点
· 钟点：at 8 o'clock, at noon, at night

examples.en: We have a meeting on Monday.

name: Prepositions of Place
explanation:
地点和方向介词的用法。

【in】在...里面：in the box, in the room
【on】在...上面（接触表面）：on the table, on the wall
【at】在某地点（小地点）：at home, at school, at the bus stop

【方向介词】
· to：去...（方向）：go to school
· from：从...（来源）：I come from China
· through：穿过（立体）：walk through the tunnel

examples.en: The cat is on the table.

name: Conjunctions
explanation:
连词用来连接词、短语或句子。

【并列连词】
· and：和（并列）：I like tea and coffee.
· but：但是（转折）：I like tea but I don't like coffee.
· or：或者（选择）：Do you want tea or coffee?
· so：所以（结果）：It was raining, so we stayed home.

【从属连词】
· because：因为（原因）：I stayed home because it was raining.
· when：当...时（时间）：Call me when you arrive.
· if：如果（条件）：If it rains, I will stay home.

examples.en: I stayed home because I was sick.
examples.zh: 我待在家里因为生病了。

name: there be
explanation:
there be 句型用来描述某处存在某物。

【结构】
· 单数/不可数名词：There is + 单数名词/不可数名词
· 复数名词：There are + 复数名词

【时态变化】
· 一般现在时：There is/are
· 一般过去时：There was/were
· 将来时：There will be / There is/are going to be

【疑问句】Are there...? / Is there...?

examples.en: There is a book on the table.
There are five apples in the bowl.

name: Questions and Negatives
explanation:
疑问句和否定句的构成。

【疑问句】
· 助动词提前：Do you like...? / Can she...?
· be动词提前：Are you...? / Is he...?
· 特殊疑问句：Wh- + 助动词/be动词 + 主语...?

【否定句】
· 助动词 + not：don't / doesn't / didn't + 动词原形
· be动词 + not：am not/isn't/aren't
· 情态动词 + not：can't/mustn't/shouldn't

name: some/any/much/many
explanation:
这些词用来表达数量和程度。

【some/any】
· some：肯定句、表示请求/建议的疑问句：I have some money. / Would you like some coffee?
· any：否定句、疑问句：I don't have any money. / Do you have any questions?

【much/many】
· much + 不可数名词：much time, much water
· many + 可数名词复数：many books, many people

【区别】much 用于不可数名词，many 用于可数名词

examples.en: How many books do you have?

name: Fixed Collocations and Phrasal Verbs
explanation:
固定搭配和短语动词是英语中的重要部分。

【固定搭配】动词+介词/副词的固定组合
· listen to：听...
· look for：寻找
· depend on：取决于

【短语动词】动词+副词/介词，意思往往与原来的动词不同
· give up：放弃
· look after：照顾
· take off：起飞；脱掉
· turn on/off：打开/关闭

examples.en: I am looking for my keys.
Can you look after my cat?

name: Conditional Sentences (if)
explanation:
条件句用来描述假设的情况及其结果。

【第一类条件句】可能实现的条件
· 结构：If + 一般现在时，主语 + will + 动词原形
· 例：If it rains, I will stay home.

【第二类条件句】不太可能或假设的条件
· 结构：If + 一般过去时，主语 + would + 动词原形
· 例：If I won the lottery, I would buy a house.

【注意】if 从句用现在时表示将来，不用 will

examples.en: If it rains, we will cancel the picnic.
examples.zh: 如果下雨，我们会取消野餐。

examples.en: If I have time, I will help you.
examples.zh: 如果我有时间，我会帮你。

examples.en: If I were you, I would go.

name: Gerund and Infinitive
explanation:
动名词（-ing）和不定式（to do）的用法。

【动名词 -ing】
· 作主语：Swimming is good exercise.
· 介词后：I am interested in learning French.
· 某些动词后：enjoy, mind, avoid + -ing

【不定式 to do】
· 表示目的：I came here to learn.
· 某些动词后：want, decide, promise + to do
· 名词/形容词后：It is important to sleep well.

【区别】remember/stop/forget + to do（未做）vs + -ing（已做）

examples.en: It is important to sleep well.
